title: Claude Code 更新了新的 /init 命令 现在运行不只会帮你写 Claude.md 还会扫描你的代码库询问相关信息，帮你配置对应的 Skills 、插件、Hook 将这段内容添加到 settings.json 开启："CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT": "1"

content.summary: Claude Code 更新了新的 /init 命令 现在运行不只会帮你写 Claude.md 还会扫描你的代码库询问相关信息，帮你配置对应的 Skills 、插件、Hook 将这段内容添加到 settings.json 开启："CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT": "1" Thariq (@trq212) we're testing a new version of /init based on your feedback- it should interview you and help setup skills, hooks, etc. you can enable it with this env_var flag: CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT=1 claude would love your feedback! — https://nitter.net/trq212/status/2035799806640115806#m
content.full_text:
